name: remove_net
short_description: Remove nets from the current design
full_help:
remove_net

Description: 
Remove nets from the current design

Syntax: 
remove_net  [-prune] [-quiet] [-verbose] <nets>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-prune]    When performing net removal, remove pins and ports which are 
              left unconnected as a result of the remove_net operation.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <nets>      List of nets to remove

Categories: 
Netlist

arguments.description: When performing net removal, remove pins and ports which are left unconnected as a result of the remove_net operation.
Suspend message limits during command execution
